title: 侧边栏高度
completionRule: Complete only when every left/right geometry control, trigger-area control, blank-area mode, drag-handle state, legacy persistence field, runtime geometry rule, Card-shell lifecycle, accessibility equivalent, responsive layout and bounded-write/performance requirement has automated evidence against the canonical Reader Shell configuration.

sourceUiInventory.title: 说明、拖拽手柄开关与顶部层级
acceptanceItems: Card 顶部说明为自由调整侧边栏的尺寸与位置。高度 100% 时位置控制禁用。
显示拖拽手柄 Label 与 Switch 位于说明右侧
showDragHandle 默认 false
拖拽手柄仅在对应侧边栏非 full 时渲染
左右侧边栏拖拽手柄共享同一全局开关
Switch 具有稳定 id show-drag-handle 与关联 Label

sourceUiInventory.title: 空白区收回开关、单击/双击模式与说明
acceptanceItems: 空白区点击收回侧边栏 Switch 默认开启
single / 单击为默认模式
double / 双击为第二个互斥模式
当前模式按钮使用 default variant，另一项使用 outline
关闭总开关时两个模式按钮 disabled 且整行 opacity-40
说明明确仅空白区域生效，图标和按钮不触发收回
interactive element 判定覆盖 button、input、select、textarea、a 与可交互后代
单击模式不响应 dblclick 路径，双击模式不响应 click 路径
左右侧边栏遵循相同规则

sourceUiInventory.title: 左侧边栏高度、Y 轴和 X 轴控件
acceptanceItems: PanelLeft 蓝色图标与左侧边栏标题
高度 range 10..100、step 1、默认 100%，值标签四舍五入并显示百分比
高度 100 写入 preset=full 且 customHeight=100
高度 10..99 写入 preset=custom 与对应 customHeight
导入 full、2/3、half、1/3、custom 五个 preset 时分别投影 100、66.67、50、33.33、customHeight
Y 轴 range 0..100、step 1、默认 0%，值标签为百分比
full 高度时 Y 轴分组 opacity-30、pointer-events-none
X 轴 range 0..100、step 1、默认 0%，值标签为百分比
X 轴端点文字为贴边与居中
左 X 偏移公式为 left = horizontalPos * 0.5%

sourceUiInventory.title: 右侧边栏高度、Y 轴和 X 轴控件
acceptanceItems: PanelRight 绿色图标与右侧边栏标题
高度 range 10..100、step 1、默认 100%，值标签四舍五入并显示百分比
高度 100 写入 preset=full 且 customHeight=100
高度 10..99 写入 preset=custom 与对应 customHeight
Y 轴 range 0..100、step 1、默认 0%，值标签为百分比
full 高度时 Y 轴分组 opacity-30、pointer-events-none
X 轴 range 0..100、step 1、默认 0%，值标签为百分比
X 轴端点文字为贴边与居中
右 X 偏移公式为 right = horizontalPos * 0.5%
左右控件状态完全独立，修改一侧不覆盖另一侧

sourceUiInventory.title: 高度与垂直对齐运行时投影
acceptanceItems: 高度百分比大于等于 100 时运行时样式为 top:0 与 bottom:0
非全高 top 百分比公式为 (100-heightPercent)*(align/100)
align 0 为顶部、50 为居中、100 为底部
外层侧栏高度使用规范百分比且内部占满
几何变化不改变 panel/card 顺序、可见性、pin 或 open 状态
规范化层将高度限制 10..100、位置限制 0..100，拒绝 NaN/Infinity

sourceUiInventory.title: 四边触控区域滑杆
acceptanceItems: MousePointer2 图标与触控区域 (px) 标题
左边缘 range 4..64、step 1、规范默认 32px
右边缘 range 4..64、step 1、规范默认 32px
顶边缘 range 2..48、step 1、规范默认 32px
底边缘 range 2..48、step 1、规范默认 32px
每个滑杆显示实时整数值
局部更新合并其他三个 hoverAreas 字段
侧边栏关闭时左右 trigger width 成为实际边缘命中宽度
旧 Card 在 panels 缺失时上下边缘回退 4px 与 settings defaults 32px 冲突，目标只采用规范 32px 默认并保留显式旧值导入

sourceUiInventory.title: 双栏层级、图标、密度与响应式几何
acceptanceItems: Card 根为 text-xs、muted foreground 与 space-y-5
左右控制使用 grid-cols-2、gap-x-6、gap-y-4
左侧使用 blue-500/blue-400，右侧使用 green-500/green-400 作为区分色
Maximize2、MoveVertical、MoveHorizontal 图标语义保持
数值使用 font-mono 与 tabular-nums
触控区域为独立有边框背景分组和 2x2 网格
分隔线位于几何控制与触控区域之间
1920x1080 基线保持旧版层级和信息密度
窄 Card 必须响应式转为单列或收紧间距，控件不得重叠或横向溢出

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧双存储来源与唯一规范 TOML
acceptanceItems: 旧几何、手柄和空白区字段来自 localStorage key neoview-sidebar-config
旧 store 初始化时以 initialState 补缺字段并合并已知 panel
旧 store 每次状态变化立即写 localStorage
旧 hoverAreas 独立通过 settingsManager panels.hoverAreas 写入
旧 JSON 解析或写入失败时稳定回退且不使 Reader 崩溃
XR 一次性导入两个旧来源后写入唯一 [nodes.neoview] Shell 契约
规范字段使用 snake_case、严格范围和枚举校验
局部 PATCH 保留未知未来 Shell、Panel 与 Card 字段
拖动中仅本地/DOM 预览，interaction end 至多一次原子 PATCH
失败回滚到最近确认值，迟到 hydrate/PATCH 不覆盖更新交互

sourceUiInventory.title: Registry、共享 Card 外壳、生命周期与性能
acceptanceItems: Card ID sidebarHeight、标题侧边栏高度、默认 control Panel、canHide=true
CardRenderer 动态 import 且缓存组件
共享外壳支持折叠、隐藏、排序、移动、高度与独立窗口
Card 隐藏或折叠时内容订阅零挂载
settingsManager listener、pointer listener 与 pending timer 在卸载时释放
所有控件为 O(1) DOM 与 O(1) 状态
滑杆 pointermove 不触发 ReaderApp/活动图像重挂
配置变化保留活动 img DOM 身份与 asset URL
Card 保持独立延迟 chunk，不进入 Reader entry 或基础 Sidebar chunk
生产 chunk 有显式字节预算且 Windows 重验证严格串行

sourceUiInventory.title: 键盘可访问性与完整交互状态
acceptanceItems: Switch 和 Label 通过 id/for 关联并暴露 checked 状态
所有 range 具有可访问名称、min/max/now 与键盘步进
单击/双击模式为互斥选择并暴露 pressed/selected 状态
full 高度下 Y 轴使用真正 disabled 而非仅 pointer-events-none
颜色不是区分左右或当前模式的唯一手段
键盘和触摸用户可完成所有 Card 设置
拖拽手柄提供非拖拽的键盘移动等价操作
覆盖默认、hover、focus-visible、active、disabled、pending、error、rollback 与 disposed 状态
prefers-reduced-motion 不影响几何控制可用性

items.title: 左侧边栏高度 10..100%
items.targetContract: Expose the legacy 10..100 integer range, project 100 to full and lower values to custom, and apply it immediately to the left Reader sidebar.
items.notes: Must preserve active Reader image identity.

items.title: 右侧边栏高度 10..100%
items.targetContract: Expose the legacy 10..100 integer range, project 100 to full and lower values to custom, and apply it immediately to the right Reader sidebar.
items.notes: Left and right updates are independent.

items.title: 保留五个旧高度预设
items.targetContract: The shared schema imports full, 2/3, half, 1/3 and custom with exact percent projection while the slider writes only full or custom.
items.notes: Do not discard legacy 2/3, half or 1/3 during import.

items.title: 左侧 Y 轴 0..100%
items.targetContract: Position the non-full left sidebar from top through center to bottom using the legacy bounded formula; disable the control at full height.
items.notes: The scripted harness proves full-height semantic disabled state and re-enables Y after a height change.

items.title: 右侧 Y 轴 0..100%
items.targetContract: Position the non-full right sidebar from top through center to bottom using the legacy bounded formula; disable the control at full height.
items.notes: The scripted harness covers the right geometry column and full-height disabled state; runtime persistence remains pending.

items.title: 左侧 X 轴贴边到居中
items.targetContract: Expose 0..100 with the legacy left offset projection of value times 0.5 percent.
items.notes: 0 means edge and 100 means center.

items.title: 右侧 X 轴贴边到居中
items.targetContract: Expose 0..100 with the legacy right offset projection of value times 0.5 percent.
items.notes: 0 means edge and 100 means center.

items.title: 显示并操作侧边栏拖拽手柄
items.targetContract: One shared switch controls non-full left/right drag handles; pointer movement is bounded and keyboard/touch equivalents persist once at completion.
items.notes: The harness verifies the resident switch and records the full drag-handle behavior as a remaining shell integration item.

items.title: 空白区点击收回侧边栏
items.targetContract: A default-on shared toggle collapses either sidebar only from genuine blank-area activation and never from interactive descendants.
items.notes: The harness verifies the default-on switch and disabled mode controls; genuine blank-area event routing remains a shell integration item.

items.title: 单击/双击收回模式
items.targetContract: Expose mutually exclusive single and double modes, default single, and disable mode controls while blank-area collapse is off.
items.notes: The harness verifies single as the selected default and both modes become disabled when the parent switch is off.

items.title: 左边缘触发宽度 4..64px
items.targetContract: Persist and apply an integer 4..64 left trigger width with canonical default 32.
items.notes: The scripted harness verifies the canonical 32px left trigger value; persistence and partial merge coverage remain pending.

items.title: 右边缘触发宽度 4..64px
items.targetContract: Persist and apply an integer 4..64 right trigger width with canonical default 32.
items.notes: The scripted harness verifies the canonical 32px right trigger value; persistence and partial merge coverage remain pending.

items.title: 顶边缘触发高度 2..48px
items.targetContract: Persist and apply an integer 2..48 top trigger height with canonical default 32.
items.notes: The scripted harness verifies the canonical 32px top trigger value; persistence remains pending.

items.title: 底边缘触发高度 2..48px
items.targetContract: Persist and apply an integer 2..48 bottom trigger height with canonical default 32.
items.notes: The scripted harness verifies the canonical 32px bottom trigger value; persistence remains pending.

items.title: 严格规范化几何边界
items.targetContract: The shared contract rejects non-finite values and bounds heights to 10..100, align/offset to 0..100, side triggers to 4..64 and top/bottom triggers to 2..48.
items.notes: Target closes the old unbounded vertical-align setter gap.

items.title: 统一 Reader Shell 几何投影
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share one geometry DTO; the controlled Reader Shell applies height, vertical alignment, horizontal offset, trigger and blank-collapse semantics without a parallel UI store.
items.notes: Must compose with existing open/pin/width state.

items.title: 原子持久化规范 Shell 配置
items.targetContract: Canonical state lives under [nodes.neoview]; transient slider movement is local and interaction completion produces at most one serialized atomic PATCH with rollback and unknown-field preservation.
items.notes: No new database or localStorage runtime truth source.

items.title: 导入两个旧设置来源
items.targetContract: Import geometry/blank/handle values from neoview-sidebar-config and hoverAreas from legacy settings once, normalize them, and never let stale legacy storage override canonical TOML afterward.
items.notes: Explicit imported values win over defaults; canonical settings default for all four triggers is 32.

items.title: 版本化共享配置与竞态语义
items.targetContract: Use the existing revisioned serialized mutation boundary for optimistic updates, stale response rejection, failure rollback and partial merge preservation across GUI, CLI and TUI.
items.notes: Do not add another ReaderApp Promise queue.

items.title: 完整控件与持久化状态
items.targetContract: Cover default, hover, focus-visible, selected, disabled-at-full, pending, error, rollback, collapsed, hidden and disposed states without ambiguous values.
items.notes: Legacy has no explicit error UI; XR must provide coherent rollback/error feedback.

items.title: 键盘、触摸与语义等价操作
items.targetContract: All switches, ranges and mode controls have names/state and keyboard operation; disabled controls are semantic, and drag handles have keyboard/touch equivalents with focus preserved.
items.notes: Labels, not color alone, distinguish sides and modes.

items.title: 旧版层级、控件、图标与密度
items.targetContract: Preserve the compact top controls, colored left/right geometry groups, icon semantics, live monospaced values, trigger-area group and explanatory text at the 1920x1080 baseline.
items.notes: Legacy and target baselines are captured at output/playwright/legacy-neoview-sidebar-height-1920x1080.png and output/playwright/neoview-sidebar-height-1920x1080.png.

items.title: 约束 Card 响应式几何
items.targetContract: At constrained Card widths, reflow the two geometry columns without overlap, clipped labels, unusable ranges or horizontal page overflow while retaining all controls.
items.notes: The 1920px harness proves no horizontal overflow; a constrained Card viewport remains planned.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳与独立窗口
items.targetContract: Sidebar Height remains an independently lazy, hideable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable control-panel Card.
items.notes: Shared Card shell behavior is required, not duplicated in the Card.

items.title: 懒加载、监听释放与迟到响应
items.targetContract: Hidden/collapsed Card content is zero mounted work, listeners and pointer work are released on close, and stale hydrate/PATCH responses cannot overwrite a newer interaction or session.
items.notes: The legacy settingsManager listener must not leak across Card remounts.

items.title: 几何变化不重挂阅读图像
items.targetContract: Every height, align, offset, trigger, blank-mode and drag-handle update preserves the active img DOM node, asset URL and decode path.
items.notes: No ReaderFrame remount for shell-only geometry.

items.title: DOM、渲染、写入与 chunk 预算
items.targetContract: Keep O(1) DOM/state, DOM-only slider/drag preview, one completion PATCH, no navigation hot-path regression, and independent deferred Card code under an explicit production budget.
items.notes: Heavy verification must run strictly serial on Windows.

items.title: 记录规范化、写入和可访问性改进
items.targetContract: Document canonical 32px trigger defaults, strict numeric clamping, semantic disabled controls, accessible drag alternatives, serialized completion writes and canonical TOML as deliberate improvements without removing legacy options.
items.notes: The legacy Card fallback 4px versus settings default 32px conflict must not survive as dual defaults.
